sqlMap.select: select * from FundsControlledSupp where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into FundsControlledSupp(VersionSequence, PolicyKey TotalAmountOfClientFundsFc IsCountersignatureRequiredFc IsBankAccountReconciledFc IsFirmPersonnelBusinessManagerFc NumberOfClientsFc NumberOfFirmEmployeesFc IsEmployeeDishonestyCoverageFc TotlaNumberOfClientsFc IsControlFundsForBusinessAndEntimentFc ProvideNumberOfClientFc ClientIndustryFc ClientIndustryFcOthers ) values (#VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC# #TotalAmountOfClientFundsFc# #IsCountersignatureRequiredFc# #IsBankAccountReconciledFc# #IsFirmPersonnelBusinessManagerFc# #NumberOfClientsFc# #NumberOfFirmEmployeesFc# #IsEmployeeDishonestyCoverageFc# #TotlaNumberOfClientsFc# #IsControlFundsForBusinessAndEntimentFc# #ProvideNumberOfClientFc# #ClientIndustryFc# #ClientIndustryFcOthers# )
sqlMap.select: select TotalAmountOfClientFundsFc, IsCountersignatureRequiredFc, IsBankAccountReconciledFc, IsFirmPersonnelBusinessManagerFc, NumberOfClientsFc, NumberOfFirmEmployeesFc, IsEmployeeDishonestyCoverageFc, TotlaNumberOfClientsFc, IsControlFundsForBusinessAndEntimentFc, ProvideNumberOfClientFc, ClientIndustryFc, ClientIndustryFcOthers, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from FundsControlledSupp where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.update:
update FundsControlledSupp set
TotalAmountOfClientFundsFc = #TotalAmountOfClientFundsFc# TotalAmountOfClientFundsFc = null IsCountersignatureRequiredFc = #IsCountersignatureRequiredFc# IsCountersignatureRequiredFc = null IsBankAccountReconciledFc = #IsBankAccountReconciledFc# IsBankAccountReconciledFc = null IsFirmPersonnelBusinessManagerFc = #IsFirmPersonnelBusinessManagerFc# IsFirmPersonnelBusinessManagerFc = null NumberOfClientsFc = #NumberOfClientsFc# NumberOfClientsFc = null NumberOfFirmEmployeesFc = #NumberOfFirmEmployeesFc# NumberOfFirmEmployeesFc = null IsEmployeeDishonestyCoverageFc = #IsEmployeeDishonestyCoverageFc# IsEmployeeDishonestyCoverageFc = null TotlaNumberOfClientsFc = #TotlaNumberOfClientsFc# TotlaNumberOfClientsFc = null IsControlFundsForBusinessAndEntimentFc = #IsControlFundsForBusinessAndEntimentFc# IsControlFundsForBusinessAndEntimentFc = null ProvideNumberOfClientFc = #ProvideNumberOfClientFc# ProvideNumberOfClientFc = null ClientIndustryFc = #ClientIndustryFc# ClientIndustryFc = null ClientIndustryFcOthers = #ClientIndustryFcOthers# ClientIndustryFcOthers = null
where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from FundsControlledSupp where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
delete from FundsControlledSupp where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
sqlMap.select: select TotalAmountOfClientFundsFc, IsCountersignatureRequiredFc, IsBankAccountReconciledFc, IsFirmPersonnelBusinessManagerFc, NumberOfClientsFc, NumberOfFirmEmployeesFc, IsEmployeeDishonestyCoverageFc, TotlaNumberOfClientsFc, IsControlFundsForBusinessAndEntimentFc, ProvideNumberOfClientFc, ClientIndustryFc, ClientIndustryFcOthers, VersionSequence, PolicyKey from FundsControlledSupp where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#

select VersionSequence, PolicyKey, TotalAmountOfClientFundsFc, IsCountersignatureRequiredFc, IsBankAccountReconciledFc, IsFirmPersonnelBusinessManagerFc, NumberOfClientsFc, NumberOfFirmEmployeesFc, IsEmployeeDishonestyCoverageFc, TotlaNumberOfClientsFc, IsControlFundsForBusinessAndEntimentFc, ProvideNumberOfClientFc, ClientIndustryFc, ClientIndustryFcOthers from FundsControlledSupp where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey#
